query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}} 
sc_status = *
| timeslice 15m
| concat (x_forwarded_for,",",c_ip) as xffi 
| parse regex field=xffi "(?<i>[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3})" nodrop 
| count as ip_count  by i ,_timeslice | where IsPublicIp (i) | i as c_ip 

| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| sum(ip_count) as hits  by  country_name,_timeslice | sort _timeslice,hits
|if (hits<100,"others",country_name) as country_name | sum(hits) as hits by country_name, _timeslice | transpose row _timeslice column country_name

sources.dashboardDescription: The Nginx - Web cs_host Operations Dashboard provides a high-level view combined with detailed information on the top ten bots, geographic locations and data for clients with high error rates, server errors over time, and non 200 response code status codes. Dashboard panels also show information on server error logs, error log levels, error responses by server, and the top URIs responsible for 404 responses.
